name: the-touch
prompt: Extreme close-up on two hands making contact. Pale frost-touched fingers being held by warmer hands. Moment of connection. Soft pink light beginning to emanate from contact point. Shallow depth of field, everything else abstracted. | anime style, modern anime aesthetic, clean linework, mature shading, dramatic lighting, high contrast, cel shading

sfx.description: soft warmth pulsing, gentle energy hum beginning, like a heartbeat amplifying

name: transfer-activates
prompt: Close-up on young woman with glasses. Eyes widening in shock, glasses beginning to fog. Lips parting. Pink warmth flooding into her expression. Body tensing visibly. Heavy shadows behind, dark vignette closing in. | anime style, modern anime aesthetic, clean linework, bold expressions, mature shading, dramatic lighting, high contrast, cel shading
bubble: Speech from Mira, close-up on face, place bubble TOP-RIGHT avoiding face

name: memory-transfer
prompt: Split flash panel. LEFT half: warm amber heat, male hands cupping face, soft orange glow. RIGHT half: crystalline shatter, ice blue fragments, cold breaking apart. Two sensations colliding in one frame. Stylized memory panel, no figures visible, pure color and energy. | anime style, modern anime aesthetic, dramatic lighting, amber orange and ice blue split color palette, high contrast, cel shading

name: rei-watching
prompt: Close-up on young woman with long silver hair. Ice blue eyes watching intently, expression carefully neutral but something vulnerable beneath. Observing Mira's reaction to the transfer. Clinical infirmary lighting, pale background. | anime style, modern anime aesthetic, clean linework, bold expressions, mature shading, dramatic lighting, cool blue color palette, high contrast, cel shading
bubble: Internal thought from Rei, close-up on face, place thought bubble TOP as internal monologue
